props.title: New Article: Twelve Hundred Dollars Traded in Twenty-Four Hours. Fourteen People Starred the Repo in the Same Window.

props.text: MiroShark's token posted its lowest daily volume ever ($1,200) on the same day 14 developers starred the repo.
The article explores the widening gap between speculative markets and utility signals — stars climbing through a 96% drawdown while crypto spot volume hits multi-year lows.
